notes: Platform merchant model: one platform account, a subaccount per business. Outbound: list banks (backs GET /banks), resolve account name (backs POST /payout-account/resolve), create/update subaccount (backs PUT /payout-account, stores bankCode+accountNumber+accountName only), initialize transaction for a debt pay-link (backs POST /debts/:id/pay-link). Behind a PaystackGateway interface, stubbed in tests.
